patterns.label: Azure DevOps Notification Triage
patterns.llmRationale: 200 total across 8 UNBROKEN cycles. +30 this cycle (150 min/wk). Machine-parseable subject prefixes. Most consistent signal in catalog. INSTITUTIONAL maturity. Velocity: 25 occ/cycle avg. AutomationScore 95 — highest in catalog.

patterns.label: Meeting Notes & Action Item Capture
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 8 +19: meeting notes docs (7), post-meeting workflow chain (12). 112 total, 16.0 hrs/wk. Chain head for 2 confirmed workflows. 4-source pattern (highest breadth). INSTITUTIONAL. Highest composite in catalog.

patterns.label: Agent Eval Setup, Analysis & Standardized Reporting
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 8 +14: status request threads (8), weekly review with leadership (1), evals metrics dashboard (5). 98 total, 21.25 hrs/wk. Highest-value pattern (95). Highest participant count tied (5). INSTITUTIONAL. Time/week continues climbing.

patterns.label: Cross-Tool Issue Thread Fragmentation & Context Loss
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 8 +20: stakeholder FYI loops (12), cross-team dependency threads (8). 99 total, 13.17 hrs/wk. ACCELERATING for 3rd consecutive cycle. 4-source pattern. Fragmentation worsening as team grows. Approaching institutional.

patterns.label: Incident Documentation & Response Coordination
patterns.llmRationale: SURGING: Cycle 8 +28: evals regression alerts (7), triage meetings (2), on-call incident chat (12), full workflow chain (7). 86 total from 3 cycles. Velocity 28.67/cycle — highest in catalog. Alert-triage-resolve-status chain confirmed 2nd cycle.

patterns.label: Copilot / Agent Platform Architecture Q&A
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 8 +20: evals channel feature threads (15), PM-engineering decision pings (5). 96 total, 14.67 hrs/wk. INSTITUTIONAL (8/8 cycles).

patterns.label: Recurring Meeting Agenda Preparation
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 8 +10: daily standup (5), weekly review (1), sprint planning (1), design review (1), 1:1 (1), all-hands (1). 62 total, 29.09 hrs/wk. INSTITUTIONAL (8/8 cycles). Highest participant count (6).

patterns.label: Calendar Overload & Meeting Invite Triage
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 8 +16: meeting invite cascade (15), all-hands (1). 159 total, 36.5 hrs/wk. Cascade reconfirmed: 1 change triggers 3-5 downstream invites. Highest total time/week.

patterns.label: Action Item Owner Chasing & Status Follow-Up
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 8 +15: PM-engineering decision pings (15 partial). 52 total, 4.4 hrs/wk. Rising 3rd consecutive cycle.

patterns.label: Stakeholder FYI & Visibility Loop Classification
patterns.llmRationale: CONFIRMED cycle 8: +22 (12 FYI threads + 10 AMA). 56 total. NEARLY TRIPLED. High automation (structured subjects).

patterns.label: Eval Framework Template & Coverage Model Scaffolding
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 8 +7: specs (3), RFCs (2), sprint planning prep (1), design review prep (1). 34 total, 12.5 hrs/wk. Rising 4th consecutive cycle.

patterns.label: Weekly Project Status Report Generation
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 8 +5: digest emails (4), authored report (1). 29 total, 6.75 hrs/wk. INSTITUTIONAL (8/8). Friday cadence.

patterns.label: Action Items Tracked Across Fragmented Systems
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 8 +8: cross-team dependency threads (8). 38 total, 5.01 hrs/wk. Rising 3rd consecutive cycle.

patterns.label: External Stakeholder Post-Meeting Recap & Follow-Up Drafting
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 8 +7: external partner emails (6), demo readout (1). 37 total, 7.65 hrs/wk. Steady growth.

patterns.label: VoC / Customer Ask Deduplication & Routing
patterns.llmRationale: No direct signal in cycle 8. Structural pattern (role-based). Holds at stable. Mature (7/8 cycles).

patterns.label: Meeting Transcript to Summary to Loop/PPT Pipeline
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 8 +2: demo (1), content review (1). 27 total, 7.5 hrs/wk. Steady.

patterns.label: Partner & Customer Eval Enablement Coordination
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 8 +2: cross-team alignment syncs. 22 total, 13.75 hrs/wk. High time-per-occurrence.

patterns.label: Personal Daily Prep & Briefing
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 8 +5: standup prep. 30 total. Single participant limits value.

patterns.label: Approval Request & Sign-off Workflow
patterns.llmRationale: CONFIRMED cycle 8: +5 approval threads. 15 total. Structured workflow: request, wait, follow-up, respond.

patterns.label: Recruiting & Interview Debrief Coordination
patterns.llmRationale: CONFIRMED cycle 8: +8 (debriefs + chat). 24 total. Doubled from cycle 7.

patterns.label: Redundant Deck Creation for Overlapping Topics
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 8 +1: content review deck. 13 total. Low frequency, high per-instance time (~41 min/occ).

patterns.label: Operational FYI Broadcast Email Classification
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 8 +5. High automation (92), low value (43, single participant). Notification cluster member.

patterns.label: Customer Engagement SDR & Discovery Note Creation
patterns.llmRationale: No signal 3 consecutive cycles. Approaching archive.

patterns.label: Training / Hackathon Event Artifact Coordination
patterns.llmRationale: No signal 3 consecutive cycles. Event-driven. Will re-emerge with next event.

patterns.label: Customer Signals Aggregation & Planning Tracker Refresh
patterns.llmRationale: No signal 3 consecutive cycles. Approaching archive.

patterns.label: Access Governance & Compliance Alert Triage
patterns.llmRationale: No signal 3 cycles. High automation, low value. Approaching archive.

patterns.label: Ownership Routing & DRI Lookup
patterns.llmRationale: No signal 3 cycles. Approaching archive.

patterns.label: Cross-Tool Link Chasing & Access Resolution
patterns.llmRationale: No signal 3 cycles. Declining toward archive.

patterns.label: Escalation & Follow-Up Email Drafting
patterns.llmRationale: ARCHIVED: No signal 4+ cycles. Absorbed by other patterns.

patterns.label: Last-Minute Review Deck Maintenance Before ROBs
patterns.llmRationale: ARCHIVED: No signal 4+ cycles. Subsumed by redundant-deck-creation.

patterns.label: FFv2 Flights & Rollout Unblocking Guidance
patterns.llmRationale: ARCHIVED since cycle 6. No signal 6+ cycles.

candidateSkills.name: meeting-notes-action-extractor
candidateSkills.description: Ingests meeting transcript, emits structured action items with owner/due-date, decisions log, follow-up email draft, and Work Tracker tasks. Handles the entire post-meeting workflow chain end-to-end.
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Replaces 16.0 hrs/week across 4 roles. 112 occurrences over 8 cycles. Chain head for 2 workflows. INSTITUTIONAL maturity. Est. $41,600/yr savings.

candidateSkills.name: ado-notification-router
candidateSkills.description: Classifies ADO notification emails by work-item type, priority, and required action. Routes to right role. Filters noise from actionable items.
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Eliminates 10.5 hrs/week. 200 occurrences. Highest automation score (95). Most consistent signal (8/8 cycles). Est. $27,300/yr savings.

candidateSkills.name: eval-report-synthesizer
candidateSkills.description: Ingests eval results, metrics dashboards, and coverage data. Produces standardized reports with trend analysis, pass/fail summaries, and leadership-ready output.
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Saves 21.25 hrs/week across 5 roles. Highest value score (95). INSTITUTIONAL maturity. Est. $55,250/yr savings.

candidateSkills.name: eval-template-scaffolder
candidateSkills.description: Generates eval scenario guides, coverage models, feature specs, RFC templates, and acceptance criteria from agent/feature description.
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Eliminates 12.5 hrs/week of template authoring. Rising 4 consecutive cycles. Est. $32,500/yr savings.

candidateSkills.name: weekly-status-report-generator
candidateSkills.description: Drafts Loop-formatted status reports from ADO sprint data, meeting notes, metrics dashboards, and blockers. Friday cadence.
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Eliminates 6.75 hrs/week. INSTITUTIONAL (8/8 cycles). Est. $17,550/yr savings.

candidateSkills.name: meeting-summary-publisher
candidateSkills.description: Converts meeting transcript to canonical Loop summary with optional PPT slide generation.
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Eliminates 7.5 hrs/week. Chain member in email-meeting-deck-followup.

candidateSkills.name: knowledge-context-consolidator
candidateSkills.description: Consolidates fragmented info across Teams, email, SharePoint, and meetings into unified context views per topic.
triggerExamples: What do we know about this?
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Addresses 13.17 hrs/week fragmentation. ACCELERATING 3 cycles. Est. $34,242/yr savings.

candidateSkills.name: incident-response-doc-generator
candidateSkills.description: Auto-generates incident triage thread, postmortem template, root cause doc, and stakeholder update emails.
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Saves 13.58 hrs/week. SURGING (highest velocity: 28.67/cycle). Est. $35,308/yr savings.

candidateSkills.name: recurring-agenda-generator
candidateSkills.description: Pre-populates recurring meeting agendas from ADO status, blockers, open action items, and prior meeting notes.
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Reduces 29.09 hrs/week across 6 participants. INSTITUTIONAL (8/8 cycles).

candidateSkills.name: voc-ask-deduplicator
candidateSkills.description: RAG-based dedup of Customer Asks against ADO backlog with DRI routing and confidence scoring.
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Replaces 30+ triage events across 8 cycles. Structural role-based pattern.
